mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ai_tool_info_config ( id, permission_code, read_only, concurrency, state_injected, tool_key, tool_name, class_name, method_name, description, input_schema, output_schema, signature_hash, enabled, updated_at, created_at ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.permissionCode}, #{item.readOnly}, #{item.concurrency}, #{item.stateInjected}, #{item.toolKey}, #{item.toolName}, #{item.className}, #{item.methodName}, #{item.description}, #{item.inputSchema}, #{item.outputSchema}, #{item.signatureHash}, 1, NOW(), NOW() )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE tool_name = IF(signature_hash <> VALUES(signature_hash), VALUES(tool_name), tool_name), class_name = IF(signature_hash <> VALUES(signature_hash), VALUES(class_name), class_name), method_name = IF(signature_hash <> VALUES(signature_hash), VALUES(method_name), method_name), description = IF(signature_hash <> VALUES(signature_hash), VALUES(description), description), input_schema = IF(signature_hash <> VALUES(signature_hash), VALUES(input_schema), input_schema), output_schema = IF(signature_hash <> VALUES(signature_hash), VALUES(output_schema), output_schema), updated_at = IF(signature_hash <> VALUES(signature_hash), NOW(), updated_at), signature_hash = VALUES(signature_hash)
